v1_detailed.description: Original detailed prompt with full CEFR definitions and examples
v1_detailed.author: Initial version

v1_key_indicators_only.description: Uses only key CEFR indicators for evaluation
v1_key_indicators_only.author: Baseline version

v2_full_guidelines.description: Includes full CEFR guidelines and descriptions for each level
v2_full_guidelines.author: Comprehensive version

v3_measurable_evidence.description: Requires specific quantifiable evidence for every score (pause counts, error frequencies, vocabulary estimates, etc.)
v3_measurable_evidence.author: Rigorous evidence-based version

v3_measurable_evidence_deepseek.description: v3_measurable_evidence with DeepSeek R1 Distill model
v3_measurable_evidence_deepseek.author: DeepSeek variant

metadata.usage: Edit .txt files in the 'prompts/' folder. Update metadata here as needed.
